metadata.description: Multi-plugin repository of specialized AI agent squads for mobile app development.

plugins.name: flutter-dev-squad
plugins.description: 11 skills + 8 agents for production-grade Flutter development. Architecture, UI, Riverpod, testing, performance, security, deployment.

plugins.name: mobile-design-squad
plugins.description: 5 skills + 2 agents for mobile UI/UX design. Discovery, UX patterns, visual design, Flutter implementation, design review.
